Watt's a challenge? Begin the challenge by maintaining a pace that produces Watts equal to 50% of the body weight (LBs) of the member. After the first minute increase the wattage by 15 Watts. For each minute after that, continue increasing the wattage by 15 Watts until they are unable to maintain the pace. Record the total time and corresponding wattages. Rest 3 minutes between each machine. The goal is the highest cumulative time between all 4 machines. ***If the total time is less than 30 minutes, repeat the machine with the lowest time*** Example: 200lb member 0:00-1:00 Maintain 100W 1:00-2:00 Maintain 115W 2:00-3:00 Maintain 130W Continue building until member is unable to maintain minimum W output.

For each minute after that, continue increasing the wattage by 15 Watts until they are unable to maintain the pace. Record the total time and corresponding wattages. Rest 3 minutes between each machine. The goal is the highest cumulative time between all 4 machines. ***If the total time is less than 30 minutes, repeat the machine with the lowest time*** Example: 200lb member 0:00-1:00 Maintain 100W 1:00-2:00 Maintain 115W 2:00-3:00 Maintain 130W Continue building until member is unable to maintain minimum W output.
